name: Elderberry Syrup Tart (Bern)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the shortcrust pastry by combining flour, butter, egg, salt, and water. Line a flan tin with half of the pastry and prick the base with a fork.
2. Boil elderberry syrup and cornflour together until thickened, then reduce heat and let cool for 15 minutes.
3. Sprinkle ground hazelnuts on top of the pastry base in the flan tin.
4. Pour in the cooled, thickened elderberry syrup mixture.
5. Cover with the remaining shortcrust pastry and seal the edges thoroughly by brushing with egg yolk.
6. Bake at 180°C (350°F) for 50 minutes.
7. Serve warm with slightly sweetened whipped cream.
Culinary Art and Traditions of Switzerland, Pro Gastronomia, 1992
